title: iberis cottiana
intro: Iberis cottiana, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and even exhibiting antiseptic properties. Candytuft is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
